latest_verified_ci.note: Phase 2D Slice 6 governance truth reconciliation — smoke + frontend both green at HEAD d2353a9.

latest_local_validation.context: Phase 2D — Odoo server-side truth path validated (LIVE_OK, 100 items). Public edge + Caddy routing validated: https://vantage.elrace.com/healthz → HTTP 200 JSON {status:ok, all backends ok}; https://vantage.elrace.com/ → HTTP 200 SPA HTML. Cloudflare Tunnel (decisioncenter, f39448f2-1898-41af-a055-fc98439088e1) routes Cloudflare edge → http://caddy:80 → app:8000 inside compose network. TLS terminates at Cloudflare edge; Caddy serves HTTP-only inside the tunnel (http:// prefix in Caddyfile is correct for this topology). No host ports bound for Caddy (override resets caddy ports to empty). DNS vantage.elrace.com resolves to Cloudflare anycast IPs. Production remains NOT_PUBLIC_LIVE.
